args.body: Reviewer disclosed feeling close to the subject (Leo Park). To avoid conflict of interest, declining to apply a direct notation/close. Routing to panel review per integrity process. Facts on record: remote attendance marked without prior approval; lab partner confirms work performed; Leo self-reported the mismatch before grades posted — relevant mitigating factors for the panel.
